assignments.name: Assign_Commercial_Queue_Id_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Commercial Queue Id To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Compliance_Queue_Id_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Compliance Queue Id To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Contracts_Queue_Id_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Contracts Queue Id To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Credit_Queue_Id_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Credit Queue Id To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Finance_Queue_Id_to_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Finance Queue Id to Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Investment_Strategy_Queue_Id_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Investment & Strategy Queue Id To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Lease_Management_Queue_Id_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Lease Management Queue Id To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Portfolio_Fund_Management_Queue_Id_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Portfolio & Fund Management Queue Id To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Technical_Queue_Id_To_Variable
assignments.label: Assign Technical Queue Id To Variable

assignments.name: Assign_Values_To_Content_Document_Link
assignments.label: Assign Values To Content Document Link

decisions.name: Assembly_Removed_Or_Linked_Or_Previous_Screen
decisions.label: Assembly Removed Or Linked Or Previous Screen

decisions.name: Find_Assembly_or_Utilization_To_Link
decisions.label: Find Assembly or Utilization To Link?

decisions.name: Utilization_Removed_Or_Linked_Or_Previous_Screen
decisions.label: Utilization Removed Or Linked Or Previous Screen

formulas.name: f_AssetInputValid
formulas.expression:
OR(
AND( {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Non_Carlyle_Asset__c} = True, {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Non_Carlyle_Asset_MSN__c} != Null )
,
AND( {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Asset__c} != Null, {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Non_Carlyle_Asset__c} = False
) )

formulas.name: f_QueryRelatedAssemblies
formulas.expression: "SELECT Name, Id, leaseworks__Type__c, leaseworks__Last_CSN_Utilization__c, leaseworks__Last_TSN_Utilization__c, leaseworks__Comments__c FROM leaseworks__Constituent_Assembly__c WHERE leaseworks__Attached_Aircraft__c = '" & {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Asset__c} & "'"

formulas.name: f_QueryRelatedUtilizations
formulas.expression: "SELECT Name, Id, leaseworks__Month_Ending__c, leaseworks__Airframe_Cycles_Landing_During_Month__c, leaseworks__Airframe_Flight_Hours_Month__c, leaseworks__Engineering_Modifications_or_Changes__c FROM leaseworks__Utilization_Report__c WHERE leaseworks__Aircraft__c = '" & {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Asset__c} & "' ORDER BY leaseworks__Month_Ending__c DESC"

Flow.interviewLabel: Prodigy - Screen - New Ticket Dynamic Linking {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Prodigy - Screen - New Ticket Dynamic Linking

fields.name: InvalidInputDisplayText
fields.fieldText: Tickets must be linked to an Asset record. To override this, check the Non Carlyle Asset checkbox and fill in the Non Carlyle Asset MSN field.

fields.name: CurrentLinkedAssembly
fields.fieldText: Currrently Linked Assembly: {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Assembly__r.Name}

fields.name: CurrentLinkedUtilization
fields.fieldText: Currrently Linked Utilization: {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Utilization__r.Name}

fields.name: TicketCreationInputScreenTitle
fields.fieldText:
{!Select_a_Ticket_type}


Information

fields.name: Non_Carlyle_Asset
fields.helpText:
Click this if it's not a Carlyle asset or if it's a non-asset-specific request.


Once checked, a field called Non Carlyle Asset MSN will appear and must be filled in.

fields.name: LinkedAssemblyDisplay
fields.fieldText:
Linked

Assembly: {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Assembly__r.Name}

Utilization: {!varTicketToCreate.pro_Utilization__r.Name}
